app.name: Misla Sawab
app.emptyActiveMajlis: No active Majlis yet. Create a new Majlis.
app.sidebarDescription: Organize Qur'an, Dhikr, and Adhkar contributions in one simple place.

home.badge: Share good deeds in the name of loved ones
home.title: Manage a Majlis of good deeds beautifully and easily
home.description: Misla Sawab helps your community manage Khatmul Qur'an, Surah recitations, and Dhikr / Adhkar contributions without crowding WhatsApp groups.

activities.khatmulQuranDescription: Safely select 30 Juz and track Khatam completion.
activities.dhikrDescription: Track Dhikr type, count and total statistics.
activities.surahDescription: Record Fathiha + Ikhlas + Falaq + Naas and Ya-Sin recitations
activities.shareDescription: Share Majlis links with respectful Islamic messages.
activities.khatmulQuranCardDescription: Choose the Juz you can recite.
activities.dhikrCardDescription: Record the Dhikr and count you recited.
activities.yaseenCardDescription: Record your Surah Ya-Sin recitation count.
activities.fathihaCardDescription: Record your Fathiha + Ikhlas + Falaq + Naas recitation count.
activities.majlisStatsDescription: View total contributors, Khatam progress, Dhikr count, and recent activity.

publicMajlis.chooseActivityDescription: Participate in any available activity below.

share.title: Share Majlis
share.description: Prepare a Malayalam message and share it on WhatsApp.

create.title: Create New Majlis
create.description: Create a public Majlis link for Khatmul Qur'an, Dhikr / Adhkar, and Surah recitations.
create.forWhomExample: Example: Khatmul Qur’an Majlis for the late Abdullah
create.descriptionPlaceholder: A good-deed Majlis arranged by family and community...
create.activityDescription: Only the selected activities will be visible to the public.
create.LinkDescription: You can share this public link in the WhatsApp group. Keep the manager link private.
create.managerLinkDescription: Keep this link private. You can use it to archive the majlis and remove incorrect contributions.

khatam.intro: Reserve the Juz you can recite first. After completing the recitation, mark it completed using the same name.
khatam.notFoundDescription: No Khatam has been created in this Majlis.
khatam.completedMessage: Alhamdulillah. This Khatam recitation is complete. You can create a new Khatam and continue participating.
khatam.pendingMessage: Note: Selecting a Juz only reserves it. After completing the recitation, mark it completed.
khatam.completedDescription: Alhamdulillah. All 30 Juz have been marked completed. You can create a new Khatam and continue participating.
khatam.reserveDescription: Enter your name first and reserve Juz. This will not count as completed yet.
khatam.markPendingTitle: Mark my pending Juz as completed
khatam.markPendingDescription: After completing your recitation, enter the same name and mark it completed.
khatam.pendingHint: Enter your name to see pending Juz here.
khatam.completedHint: Enter your name to see completed Juz here.
khatam.noPending: No pending Juz for this name.
khatam.noCompleted: No completed Juz for this name.

dhikr.intro: Choose the Dhikr / Adhkar you recited, enter the count, and record the contribution under your name.
dhikr.formDescription: Use name autocomplete to select an existing contributor.
dhikr.emptyContributorStats: Contributor stats are not available yet.
dhikr.typeStatsDescription: Total count for each Dhikr type
dhikr.emptyTypeStats: No Dhikr type statistics are available yet.

surah.fathihaBadge: Fathiha + Ikhlas + Falaq + Naas Recitation Majlis
surah.yaseenDescription: Record the number of Surah Ya-Sin recitations under your name.
surah.fathihaDescription: Record the number of Fathiha + Ikhlas + Falaq + Naas recitations under your name.
surah.totalFathiha: Total Fathiha + Ikhlas + Falaq + Naas Recitations
surah.recordDescription: Enter your name and recitation count.

statsPage.intro: View total progress and recent activity for Khatmul Qur'an, Surah recitations, and Dhikr / Adhkar.
statsPage.emptyContributors: No contributor stats are available yet.
statsPage.emptyKhatamHistory: No Khatam has been completed yet.

manager.settingsDescription: Manage public page information and enabled activities.
manager.missingTokenDescription: This page needs the private manager link. The public link cannot open the manager panel.
manager.invalidLinkDescription: This manager token may be wrong, or it may not belong to this Majlis.
manager.archiveConfirm: Archive this Majlis? Public contributors will not be able to view it later.

notFound.title: Majlis not found
notFound.description: This link may be wrong, or the Majlis may have been archived.

errors.juzAlreadySelected: This Juz has already been selected.
errors.createKhatamFailed: Could not create a new Khatam
errors.enterForWhom: Enter who this Majlis is for

success.juzReserved: Juz reserved. After completing the recitation, mark it completed.
success.juzCompleted: Your Juz has been marked completed.
